title: Ginger
summary: A warming root traditionally used to settle the stomach and support circulation.
traditional_use: Ginger has been used in kitchens and herbal practice alike as a warming, aromatic root. Traditionally it is prepared when the body feels cold, sluggish, or unsettled after travel or meals.

method_steps.title: Slice
method_steps.text: Cut a small piece of fresh root or use a teaspoon of dried slices.

method_steps.title: Simmer
method_steps.text: Steep in hot water for 10 to 15 minutes to draw out the aroma.

method_steps.title: Balance
method_steps.text: Drink plain or with a little honey or lemon if the flavor feels too sharp.

dosage_note: Traditional range: small cups through the day; keep preparations modest and conservative.

components.ratio_quantity: small piece or a teaspoon of dried slices
components.prep_notes: Steep until the aroma draws through.
